name: stage2-rvv-strided-memory-production-validation-boundary
title: Stage2 RVV strided memory production validation boundary
creator: codex
notes: Completed the Stage2 RVV strided-memory production validation boundary for strided_load_unit_store, unit_load_strided_store, computed_masked_strided_load_unit_store, and computed_masked_strided_store. Provider/planning now exposes canonical plain and computed-mask strided facts; target artifact validation consumes provider-owned stride, mask, header/type, leaf, route-family, and provider_supported_mirror facts and rejects stale cross-family/cross-route residue. Generated-bundle script and focused fixtures were kept only where needed for the production path. No ssh rvv run was needed because this round tightened provider/target validation and binding summaries without changing generated runtime semantics, runtime ABI order, stride interpretation, mask/passthrough behavior, or performance claims.
